message:
Add residual risk register, handoff scheduler tests, wildcard credential test

Extend the browser WASM security and scheduler test coverage with
three additions that close verification gaps in the preceding commits.

docs/security_threat_model.md:
- Add Residual Risk Register (Browser Scope) table documenting three
  accepted residual risks: third-party JS toolchain compromise,
  replay artifact over-collection, and host bridge misuse by
  integrators, each with current mitigations and closure triggers

src/runtime/scheduler/three_lane.rs:
- Add test_browser_ready_handoff_limit_bounds_ready_bursts: injects
  10 ready tasks with handoff limit=3 and verifies bursts are capped
  at 3, at least 3 handoff yields occur, and preemption metrics
  accurately track browser_ready_handoff_yields
- Add test_browser_ready_handoff_does_not_mask_cancel_priority:
  verifies that cancel-lane work preempts before the ready-handoff
  yield check fires, ensuring the handoff mechanism does not
  inadvertently starve cancellation processing

tests/security_invariants.rs:
- Add invariant_fetch_policy_wildcard_origin_still_denies_credentials:
  verifies that a wildcard ("*") origin allowlist does not bypass the
  credential denial policy when allow_credentials is false

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -98,6 +98,14 @@ python3 scripts/check_wasm_dependency_policy.py --policy .github/wasm_dependency
 cargo test --test security_invariants browser_fetch_security -- --nocapture
 ```
 
+### Residual Risk Register (Browser Scope)
+
+| Risk | Why Residual | Current Mitigation | Closure Trigger |
+| --- | --- | --- | --- |
+| Third-party package compromise in JS toolchains | Rust-level controls cannot fully govern npm/bundler supply chain | Dependency policy gate + lockfile review + reproducible CI artifacts | Signed provenance + policy-enforced package allowlist for browser SDK distribution |
+| Replay artifact over-collection | Traces can capture sensitive operational context if emitted too broadly | Redaction guidance + scoped diagnostics + no secret stdout/stderr | Automated artifact redaction validation gate in CI |
+| Host bridge misuse by integrators | Browser embedding layer can accidentally widen authority in app code | Explicit `FetchAuthority` contract and deny-by-default credentials | Contract tests for all host adapters plus policy check in release gate |
+
 ## Threats and Mitigations by Component
 
 ### Runtime Core
